title: carlina vulgaris
intro: Carlina vulgaris, also known as the carline thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The carline thistle is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and insomnia, and supporting the immune system. Carlina vulgaris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
